evals.prompt: Scaffold a new NestJS + PostgreSQL backend project for a task management API. Set up the project structure, Prisma ORM, JWT authentication, environment configuration, and initial tests.
evals.expected_output: NestJS project structure with modules, Prisma schema, auth module with JWT, .env.example, initial test, package.json with dependencies

assertions.name: nestjs_structure
assertions.description: Creates NestJS project structure with src/, modules, controllers, services

assertions.name: prisma_setup
assertions.description: Includes Prisma schema file with initial model

assertions.name: auth_template
assertions.description: Auth module with JWT register/login/refresh flow

assertions.name: env_example
assertions.description: .env.example with all required environment variables (placeholders only)

assertions.name: initial_test
assertions.description: At least one test file that verifies the app starts

assertions.name: scope_boundary
assertions.description: Does NOT include React/frontend setup (stays within backend scope)

evals.prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 + PostgreSQL full-stack app for a blog platform. Use Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js for Google OAuth, App Router with server components, and Tailwind CSS. Models: User and Post (title, content, slug, published, authorId).
evals.expected_output: Next.js App Router structure, Prisma schema with User and Post models, NextAuth config, Tailwind config, .env.example, initial pages

assertions.name: nextjs_app_router
assertions.description: Uses app/ directory structure with layout.tsx, page.tsx, loading.tsx

assertions.name: prisma_schema
assertions.description: Prisma schema with User and Post models and the relationship between them

assertions.name: nextauth_config
assertions.description: NextAuth setup with Google OAuth provider configuration

assertions.name: env_example
assertions.description: .env.example with NEXTAUTH_SECRET, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, DATABASE_URL placeholders

assertions.name: tailwind_config
assertions.description: Tailwind CSS configured with content paths for app/ and components/

assertions.name: initial_test
assertions.description: At least one test or the app compiles without errors

evals.prompt: Scaffold a Django 5 REST API for an inventory management system. Use Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, JWT auth with djangorestframework-simplejwt, and Celery + Redis for background tasks. Models: Product (name, SKU, price, quantity), Category (name, slug), and Warehouse (name, location).
evals.expected_output: Django project structure, DRF viewsets, models with relationships, JWT auth config, Celery setup, requirements.txt, .env.example

assertions.name: django_structure
assertions.description: Django project with manage.py, settings.py, and at least one app (inventory)

assertions.name: drf_setup
assertions.description: Django REST Framework configured with serializers, viewsets, or views

assertions.name: models_defined
assertions.description: Product, Category, and Warehouse models with proper fields and relationships

assertions.name: jwt_auth
assertions.description: djangorestframework-simplejwt configured in settings with token endpoints

assertions.name: celery_setup
assertions.description: Celery configured with Redis broker and at least one example task

assertions.name: env_example
assertions.description: .env.example with DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, SECRET_KEY placeholders

evals.prompt: Scaffold a NestJS backend for a real-time messaging service. Use MongoDB with Mongoose, Socket.IO for WebSocket connections, JWT auth, and Bull + Redis for message queue processing. Models: User, Conversation (participants, lastMessage), Message (senderId, conversationId, content, timestamp). Include the Socket.IO gateway module.
evals.expected_output: NestJS structure with Mongoose schemas, Socket.IO gateway, JWT auth, Bull queue, .env.example

assertions.name: nestjs_structure
assertions.description: NestJS project with src/, modules for auth, messages, conversations, gateway

assertions.name: mongoose_schemas
assertions.description: Mongoose schemas for User, Conversation, and Message with proper references

assertions.name: socketio_gateway
assertions.description: A @WebSocketGateway module handling real-time message events

assertions.name: jwt_auth
assertions.description: Auth module with JWT strategy and guards

assertions.name: bull_queue
assertions.description: Bull queue configured for message processing

assertions.name: env_example
assertions.description: .env.example with MONGODB_URI, REDIS_URL, JWT_SECRET placeholders

evals.prompt: Scaffold a TypeScript monorepo with React frontend (Vite) and Express backend sharing types. Use npm workspaces with packages: web (React+Vite), api (Express), and shared (TypeScript types). Backend has PostgreSQL + Prisma and JWT auth. Frontend imports types from the shared package for API responses.
evals.expected_output: Monorepo with npm workspaces, shared types package, Prisma in api, Vite React in web, cross-package type imports

assertions.name: monorepo_workspaces
assertions.description: Root package.json with workspaces array pointing to packages/*

assertions.name: shared_types_package
assertions.description: packages/shared/ with TypeScript interfaces used by both api and web

assertions.name: prisma_in_backend
assertions.description: packages/api/ has Prisma schema and client setup

assertions.name: vite_react
assertions.description: packages/web/ has Vite config with React plugin

assertions.name: jwt_auth
assertions.description: packages/api/ has JWT authentication middleware or strategy

assertions.name: cross_package_imports
assertions.description: web or api package.json references @myapp/shared as a workspace dependency
